text_preview:
Appendix C: 
Instrumentation Legend and Typical P&ID 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Improvements: SCADA Design Criteria 
Technical Memorandum
artifact_summary: Title page for Appendix C of the HFC AWTP Master Plan technical memorandum, featuring the instrumentation legend and typical P&ID.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as the designated cover sheet for Appendix C within the HFC AWTP Master Plan technical memorandum. The section, titled 'Instrumentation Legend and Typical P&ID,' provides standardized graphical symbols and process flow diagrams essential for interpreting the plant's instrumentation and control systems.
